channel.title: Story Never End — Classic Literature
channel.description: Timeless world classics, retold as audio theatre. Dorian Gray's vanity, Kafka's alienation, Jekyll and Hyde's double life — one work per episode, for listening with your eyes closed.
channel.itunes:summary: Timeless world classics, retold as audio theatre. Dorian Gray's vanity, Kafka's alienation, Jekyll and Hyde's double life — one work per episode, for listening with your eyes closed.
channel.itunes:author: Story Never End

item.title: Nineteen Eighty-Four
item.description: Nineteen Eighty-Four — An audio-theatre retelling of «Nineteen Eighty-Four».
item.itunes:summary: Nineteen Eighty-Four — An audio-theatre retelling of «Nineteen Eighty-Four».
